heading: Data files of military flight operations quality assurance systems: exemption from disclosure under Freedom of Information Act
label: 2254a Data files of military flight operations quality assurance systems: exemption from disclosure under Freedom of Information Act
notes: References in TextThe date of the enactment of this section, referred to in subsec. (a)(4), is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 112–81Dec. 31, 2011

children.heading: Authority to Exempt Certain Data Files From Disclosure Under FOIA.—
children.label: a Authority to Exempt Certain Data Files From Disclosure Under FOIA.—
A
children.text: the information is sensitive information concerning military aircraft, units, or aircrew; and

children.label: B
children.text: the public interest consideration in the disclosure of such information does not outweigh preventing the disclosure of such information.

children.label: A
children.text: any data base containing raw MFOQA data; and

children.label: B
children.text: any analysis or report generated by the MFOQA system or which is derived from MFOQA data.

Information that is exempt under paragraph (1) from disclosure under shall be exempt from such disclosure even if such information is contained in a data file that is not exempt in its entirety from such disclosure.section 552(b)(3) of title 5

The provisions of paragraph (1) may not be superseded except by a provision of law which is enacted after the date of the enactment of this section and which specifically cites and repeals or modifies those provisions.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: b .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall prescribe regulations for the administration of this section. Such regulations shall ensure consistent application of the authority in subsection (a) across the military departments.

children.heading: .—Transparency
children.label: c .—Transparency
children.text: Each determination of the Secretary under subsection (a) shall be made in writing and accompanied by a statement of the basis for the determination. All such determinations and statements of basis shall be available to the public, upon request.
